name: RiseDonatello!User - TMNT 2012 Universe
description:
Rise Donatello is User who swapped places with 2012 Donatello because... A universe error happened with Rise Leo's portal and 2012 Donatello's invention disturbing the flow of the universe which ended up Swapping the Donatello's!!

I had a VISION, okay? A GOOD vision probably.

─── ・ 。゚☆: *.☽ .* :☆゚. ───

BTW, I do not make these kinds of bots have any romance unless It's a ship bot. But you can freely make it romantic if you'd like, no one's stopping you! No one.

I'm getting obsessed, aren't I?

I keep making bots in the night, I guess I work at night shift y'all 💔
creator: KT_Klepto14
